content:
QBR SUMMARY
Customer: Meridian Health Systems
Customer ID: C001
Contract ID: K021
Account Executive: Sarah Chen
Period: H1 2025 (January – June 2025)
Meeting Date: July 15, 2025
Attendees: Sarah Chen (AE), Dr. Linda Forsythe (Director of Clinical Operations), Dr. Marcus Hill (CMO)

BUSINESS PERFORMANCE
Meridian reached record patient volumes across all three facilities in H1 2025. Site selection for the fourth facility is complete — groundbreaking expected Q1 2026. The clinical operations team grew to 45 staff members.

PLATFORM USAGE
40 of 40 licensed users active. Weekly report generation at 97 reports per week. The EHR integration is processing an average of 2,400 automated data syncs per week across all three facilities, replacing entirely the manual export process.

KEY DISCUSSION POINTS
- Dr. Hill presented InsightIQ as a case study internally at Meridian's annual operations review — described it as a model for technology adoption across the organization
- Dr. Forsythe raised a request for a training program for new clinical staff — the team is growing and onboarding new users takes time without a structured program. Sarah Chen committed to working with the customer success team on a scalable onboarding resource
- Fourth facility planning: 8-10 additional users expected when the facility opens in 2026 — to be included in 2026 renewal
- Dr. Hill raised interest in InsightIQ for the administrative and billing teams — estimated 12-15 potential additional users outside clinical operations

SATISFACTION RATING: 5/5
Dr. Hill: "InsightIQ is now part of how we think about running this organization. We're looking at expanding it beyond clinical operations for the first time."

ACTION ITEMS
- Sarah Chen to coordinate with customer success team on scalable new user onboarding resource by September 2025
- Administrative and billing team expansion scoping call to be arranged for Q4 2025
- Fourth facility user expansion to be factored into 2026 renewal proposal

NEXT QBR: January 2026
